revision.comment: update fm Meta -- This version now takes {1} if common usage, and let's you craft the message displayed vice the fixed link
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox standard-talk" style="border: 1px solid #c0c090; background-color: #f8eaba; width: 80%; margin: 2px 4px 2px 4px; " |- style="vertical-align:top;" | style="padding:1ex;width:60px;" align="center" | [[Image:Edit-paste.svg|none|40px]] | '''This is the [[w:Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern|template documentation page]] {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|for [[template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]].}}'''
This page is not necessarily intended to be viewed directly. If it uses [[w:Help:Variable|variable]]s, some links may appear broken. Do not replace these variables with [[w:hardcoded|hardcoded]] page names or URLs. |}
[[Category:Template documentation|{{PAGENAME}}]] ----
''[[Template:Template doc page viewed directly]] template ends''
;Note: This template will take an alternative parameter {{{1}}} when it is applied as a X/doc style warning in a common usage page for several utility templates. (Such as are normally related by function or application and frequently list one another as ''see also'' pages.)

Ver: fix up interwiki issues, class mesagebox 'standard-talk' not so standard, make links interwiki.// [[User:Fabartus|Fra]][[User talk:Fabartus|nkB]] 21:47, 23 February 2007 (UTC) Org: Commons, IWTG perams adusts, (mn) [[User:Fabartus|Fra]][[User talk:Fabartus|nkB]] 18:44, 12 February 2007 (UTC) {{-}} ---- {{interwikitmp-grp|inhib=yes|SYS=yes|V=0}} == See also == * [[M:Meta:Template doc page pattern]] or [[W:Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern]] for how this template is used. * Related templates: # {{tlw| Template doc page transcluded}} (as redirect: ''{{tlw|Template doc page pattern}}'') # {{tlw| Interwiki doc page pattern}} [[Category:Template documentation |!{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Template namespace templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] {{-}} [[ja:Template:テンプレート文書直接表示]]   [[sl:Predloga:Neposredno prikazana dokumentacijska stran predloge]]   [[uk:Шаблон:Документація шаблона (безпосередня)]]

revision.comment: Include namespace in template name (fixes breakage for templates in user space).
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox standard-talk" style="border: 1px solid #c0c090; background-color: #f8eaba; width: 80%; margin: 2px 4px 2px 4px; " |- style="vertical-align:top;" | style="padding:1ex;width:60px;" align="center" | [[Image:Edit-paste.svg|none|40px]] | '''This is the [[w:Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern|template documentation page]] {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|for [[{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]].}}'''
This page is not necessarily intended to be viewed directly. If it uses [[w:Help:Variable|variable]]s, some links may appear broken. Do not replace these variables with [[w:hardcoded|hardcoded]] page names or URLs. |}
[[Category:Template documentation|{{PAGENAME}}]] ----
''[[Template:Template doc page viewed directly]] template ends''
;Note: This template will take an alternative parameter {{{1}}} when it is applied as a X/doc style warning in a common usage page for several utility templates. (Such as are normally related by function or application and frequently list one another as ''see also'' pages.)

Ver: fix up interwiki issues, class mesagebox 'standard-talk' not so standard, make links interwiki.// [[User:Fabartus|Fra]][[User talk:Fabartus|nkB]] 21:47, 23 February 2007 (UTC) Org: Commons, IWTG perams adusts, (mn) [[User:Fabartus|Fra]][[User talk:Fabartus|nkB]] 18:44, 12 February 2007 (UTC) {{-}} ---- {{interwikitmp-grp|inhib=yes|SYS=yes|V=0}} == See also == * [[M:Meta:Template doc page pattern]] or [[W:Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern]] for how this template is used. * Related templates: # {{tlw| Template doc page transcluded}} (as redirect: ''{{tlw|Template doc page pattern}}'') # {{tlw| Interwiki doc page pattern}} [[Category:Template documentation |!{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Template namespace templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] {{-}} [[ja:Template:テンプレート文書直接表示]]   [[sl:Predloga:Neposredno prikazana dokumentacijska stran predloge]]   [[uk:Шаблон:Документація шаблона (безпосередня)]]

revision.comment: simplify formatting, and this - of all templates - might as well have documentation in a subpage if only to illustrate how the template is meant to work
revision.text: {| class="messagebox standard-talk" | style="vertical-align: top; padding: 1em" | [[Image:Edit-paste.svg|40px]] | This is the [[Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern|template documentation page]] {{{1|for [[{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]].}}} ---- This page is not necessarily intended to be viewed directly. If it uses [[Help:Variable|variable]]s, some links may appear broken. Do not replace these variables with [[hardcoded]] page names or URLs. |} ---- <includeonly>[[Category:Template documentation|{{PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly><noinclude> {{{{FULLPAGENAME}}/doc}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

Links using [[Help:Variable|variable]]s may appear broken; do not replace these with [[hardcoded]] page names or URLs. |} <includeonly>[[Category:Template documentation|{{PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly><noinclude> {{{{FULLPAGENAME}}/doc}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

Links using [[Help:Variable|variable]]s may appear broken; do not replace these with [[hardcoded]] page names or URLs.</small> |} {{#if:{{{inhib|}}}{{{inhibit|}}}|<!-- skip --->|<includeonly>[[Category:Template documentation|{{PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>}}<noinclude> {{template doc}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Converted to the new standard article message box {{ambox}}. See [[Wikipedia:Template standardisation]].
revision.text:

revision.comment: make backward compatible with a work around
Changed protection level for "[[Template:Documentation subpage]]": Heavily used template [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
Changed to "{{pp-template|small=yes}}" since this template is fully protected.
Update to use the {{mbox}} so it looks good on top of other mboxes on documentation pages. And using mbox and not ombox since this template is used on several types of pages.
Adding [[File:Edit-copy green.svg]], since I think this message box needs an image so it is easy to recognise.
update link, per EP on talk
[[WP:RBK|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Rich Farmbrough|Rich Farmbrough]] ([[User talk:Rich Farmbrough|talk]]) to last version by Rjd0060
Adding ":" in front of the basepage name, so it doesn't show the image if a file page, and doesn't categorize if a category.
also mention that interlanguage links are typcally found on /doc pages
add tracking category for deprecated style
tracking category is still empty after three days, so going ahead and removing the "original-recipe" code

使用方法、[[Help:カテゴリ|カテゴリ]]、およびその他{{{種類|{{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{SUBJECTSPACE ja}}ページ|記事}}}}}自体に含まれない情報を収容しています。 }} | }} | }}{{ #ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}} | doc | {{ #ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:10}} | [[Category:テンプレート文書|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Use [[Template:Terminate sentence]], which correctly determines when to add a full stop.
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}} |{{{override|doc}}} | {{#ifeq:{{{doc-notice|show}}} |show | {{Mbox | type = notice | style = margin-bottom:1.0em; | image = [[File:Edit-copy green.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text = '''This is a [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|documentation]] [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] for {{terminate sentence|{{{1|[[:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]]}}}}}'''
It contains usage information, [[Wikipedia:Categorization|categories]] and other content that is not part of the original {{#if:{{{text2|}}} |{{{text2}}} |{{#if:{{{text1|}}} |{{{text1}}} |{{#ifeq:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:User}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} template page |{{#if:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} page|article}}}}}}}}. }} }}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{{defaultsort|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{inhibit|}}} | | {{#ifexist:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}} | [[Category:{{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |Template=Template |Module=Module |User=User |#default=Wikipedia}} documentation pages]] | [[Category:Documentation subpages without corresponding pages]] }} }} | }}{{Documentation}}

<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}} | {{{override|doc}}}	
  | <!-- doc page -->	
</includeonly>{{	
    #ifeq: {{{doc-notice|show}}} | show	
    | {{ombox	
      | type = notice	
      | image = [[File:Edit-copy green.svg|40px|link=]]
      | text = 	{{Documentation subpage/text/{{#ifexist:Template:Documentation subpage/text/{{int:lang}}|{{int:lang}}|en}}|1={{{1|}}}|text2={{{text2|}}}|text1={{{text1|}}}}}
      }}	
    }}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{{defaultsort|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{
    #if: {{{inhibit|}}}
    | <!-- skip -->
    | <includeonly>__EXPECTED_UNCONNECTED_PAGE__ {{#ifexist:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Category:{{	
      #switch: {{SUBJECTSPACE}}	
      | Template  = Template
      | Module    = Module
      | User      = User	
      | #default  = Template
    }} documentation pages]]|[[Category:Documentation subpages without corresponding pages]]}}</includeonly>	
  }}<includeonly>	
| <nowiki /><!-- if not on a /doc subpage, do nothing -->
}}</includeonly><noinclude>	
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}} |{{{override|doc}}} | {{#ifeq:{{{doc-notice|show}}} |show | {{Mbox | type = notice | style = margin-bottom:1.0em; | image = [[File:Edit-copy green.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text = {{strong|This is a [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|documentation]] [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]]}} for {{terminate sentence|{{{1|[[:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]]}}}}}
It may contain usage information, [[Wikipedia:Categorization|categories]] and other content that is not part of the original {{#if:{{{text2|}}} |{{{text2}}} |{{#if:{{{text1|}}} |{{{text1}}} |{{#ifeq:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:User}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} template page |{{#if:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} page|article}}}}}}}}. }} }}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{{defaultsort|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{inhibit|}}} | | {{#ifexist:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}} | [[Category:{{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |Template=Template |Module=Module |User=User |#default=Wikipedia}} documentation pages]] | [[Category:Documentation subpages without corresponding pages]] }} }} | }}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: update fm Meta -- This version now takes {1} if common usage, and let's you craft the message displayed vice the fixed link
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox standard-talk" style="border: 1px solid #c0c090; background-color: #f8eaba; width: 80%; margin: 2px 4px 2px 4px; " |- style="vertical-align:top;" | style="padding:1ex;width:60px;" align="center" | [[Image:Edit-paste.svg|none|40px]] | '''This is the [[w:Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern|template documentation page]] {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|for [[template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]].}}'''
This page is not necessarily intended to be viewed directly. If it uses [[w:Help:Variable|variable]]s, some links may appear broken. Do not replace these variables with [[w:hardcoded|hardcoded]] page names or URLs. |}
[[Category:Template documentation|{{PAGENAME}}]] ----
''[[Template:Template doc page viewed directly]] template ends''
;Note: This template will take an alternative parameter {{{1}}} when it is applied as a X/doc style warning in a common usage page for several utility templates. (Such as are normally related by function or application and frequently list one another as ''see also'' pages.)

}}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{PAGENAME}}}}{{ #if: {{{inhibit|}}} | | [[Category:{{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | Article }} documentation| ]] }} | }} {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} ---- {{documentation}}

revision.comment: make backward compatible with a work around
Changed to "{{pp-template|small=yes}}" since this template is fully protected.
Update to use the {{mbox}} so it looks good on top of other mboxes on documentation pages. And using mbox and not ombox since this template is used on several types of pages.
Adding [[File:Edit-copy green.svg]], since I think this message box needs an image so it is easy to recognise.
update link, per EP on talk
[[WP:RBK|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Rich Farmbrough|Rich Farmbrough]] ([[User talk:Rich Farmbrough|talk]]) to last version by Rjd0060
Adding ":" in front of the basepage name, so it doesn't show the image if a file page, and doesn't categorize if a category.
also mention that interlanguage links are typcally found on /doc pages
add tracking category for deprecated style
tracking category is still empty after three days, so going ahead and removing the "original-recipe" code
revision.text:

revision.comment: Use [[Template:Terminate sentence]], which correctly determines when to add a full stop.
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}} |{{{override|doc}}} | {{#ifeq:{{{doc-notice|show}}} |show | {{Mbox | type = notice | style = margin-bottom:1.0em; | image = [[File:Edit-copy green.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text = '''This is a [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|documentation]] [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] for {{terminate sentence|{{{1|[[:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]]}}}}}'''
It contains usage information, [[Wikipedia:Categorization|categories]] and other content that is not part of the original {{#if:{{{text2|}}} |{{{text2}}} |{{#if:{{{text1|}}} |{{{text1}}} |{{#ifeq:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:User}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} template page |{{#if:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} page|article}}}}}}}}. }} }}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{{defaultsort|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{inhibit|}}} | | {{#ifexist:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}} | [[Category:{{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |Template=Template |Module=Module |User=User |#default=Wikipedia}} documentation pages]] | [[Category:Documentation subpages without corresponding pages]] }} }} | }}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: fix up interwiki issues, class mesagebox 'standard-talk' not so standard, make links interwiki.
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox standard-talk" border: 1px solid #c0c090; background-color: #f8eaba; width: 100%; margin: 2px 4px 2px 4px; " |- style="vertical-align:top;" | style="padding:1ex;width:60px;" align="center" | [[Image:Edit-paste.svg|none|40px]] | '''This is the [[w:Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern|template documentation page]] for {{tl|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}.'''

{{ #ifeq: {{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}} | {{{override|doc}}} | {{ #ifeq: {{{doc-notice|show}}} | show |
'''This is a [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|documentation]] [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] for {{{1|[[{{SUBJECTSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]]}}}''' (see that page for the {{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} | article }} itself).
It contains usage information, [[Wikipedia:Categories|categories]] and other content that is not part of the original {{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} page|article}}.
}}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{PAGENAME}}}}{{ #if: {{{inhibit|}}} | | [[Category:{{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | Article }} documentation| ]] }} | }} {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} ---- {{documentation}}

revision.comment: make backward compatible with a work around
Changed to "{{pp-template|small=yes}}" since this template is fully protected.
Update to use the {{mbox}} so it looks good on top of other mboxes on documentation pages. And using mbox and not ombox since this template is used on several types of pages.
Adding [[File:Edit-copy green.svg]], since I think this message box needs an image so it is easy to recognise.
update link, per EP on talk
Adding ":" in front of the basepage name, so it doesn't show the image if a file page, and doesn't categorize if a category.
also mention that interlanguage links are typcally found on /doc pages
add tracking category for deprecated style
tracking category is still empty after three days, so going ahead and removing the "original-recipe" code
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}} | {{{override|doc}}} | {{ #ifeq: {{{doc-notice|show}}} | show | {{mbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Edit-copy green.svg|40px]] | text = '''This is a [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|documentation]] [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] for {{{1|[[:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]]}}}''' (see that page for the {{ #if: {{{text1|}}} | {{{text1}}} | {{ #ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{ns:User}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} template | {{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} | article }}}}}} itself).

revision.comment: update fm Meta -- This version now takes {1} if common usage, and let's you craft the message displayed vice the fixed link
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox standard-talk" style="border: 1px solid #c0c090; background-color: #f8eaba; width: 80%; margin: 2px 4px 2px 4px; " |- style="vertical-align:top;" | style="padding:1ex;width:60px;" align="center" | [[Image:Edit-paste.svg|none|40px]] | '''This is the [[w:Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern|template documentation page]] {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|for [[template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]].}}'''
This page is not necessarily intended to be viewed directly. If it uses [[w:Help:Variable|variable]]s, some links may appear broken. Do not replace these variables with [[w:hardcoded|hardcoded]] page names or URLs. |}
[[Category:Template documentation|{{PAGENAME}}]] ----
''[[Template:Template doc page viewed directly]] template ends''
;Note: This template will take an alternative parameter {{{1}}} when it is applied as a X/doc style warning in a common usage page for several utility templates. (Such as are normally related by function or application and frequently list one another as ''see also'' pages.)

revision.comment: restore the previous appearence of the message when viewed directly. in particular, restore the id attribute that was removed for no apparent reason. and no images, please. this isn't a design contest

revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}|{{{override|doc}}}|

}}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{PAGENAME}}}}{{ #if: {{{inhibit|}}} | | [[Category:{{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | Article }} documentation| ]] }} | }} {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} ---- {{documentation}}

revision.comment: make backward compatible with a work around
Changed to "{{pp-template|small=yes}}" since this template is fully protected.
Update to use the {{mbox}} so it looks good on top of other mboxes on documentation pages. And using mbox and not ombox since this template is used on several types of pages.
Adding [[File:Edit-copy green.svg]], since I think this message box needs an image so it is easy to recognise.
update link, per EP on talk
Adding ":" in front of the basepage name, so it doesn't show the image if a file page, and doesn't categorize if a category.
also mention that interlanguage links are typcally found on /doc pages
add tracking category for deprecated style
tracking category is still empty after three days, so going ahead and removing the "original-recipe" code
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}} | {{{override|doc}}} | {{ #ifeq: {{{doc-notice|show}}} | show | {{mbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Edit-copy green.svg|40px]] | text = '''This is a [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|documentation]] [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] for {{{1|[[:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]]}}}''' (see that page for the {{ #if: {{{text1|}}} | {{{text1}}} | {{ #ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{ns:User}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} template | {{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} | article }}}}}} itself).
It contains usage information, [[Wikipedia:Categorization|categories]], [[Help:Interlanguage links|interlanguage links]] and other content that is not part of the original {{ #if: {{{text2|}}} | {{{text2}}} | {{ #if: {{{text1|}}} | {{{text1}}} | {{ #ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{ns:User}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} template page | {{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} page|article}}}}}}}}. }} }}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{{defaultsort|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{ #if: {{{inhibit|}}} | | [[Category:{{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | Article }} documentation| ]] }} | }} {{documentation}}

It contains usage information, [[Wikipedia:Categorization|categories]], [[Help:Interlanguage links|interlanguage links]] and other content that is not part of the original {{ #if: {{{text2|}}} | {{{text2}}} | {{ #if: {{{text1|}}} | {{{text1}}} | {{ #ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{ns:User}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} template page | {{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} page|article}}}}}}}}. }} }}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{{defaultsort|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{ #if: {{{inhibit|}}} | | [[Category:{{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | Article }} documentation| ]] }} | }} {{documentation}}

revision.text:
{| class="messagebox standard-talk" style="border: 1px solid #c0c090; background-color: #f8eaba; width: 80%; margin: 2px 4px 2px 4px; " |- style="vertical-align:top;" | style="padding:1ex;width:60px;" align="center" | [[Image:Edit-paste.svg|none|40px]] | '''This is the [[w:Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern|template documentation page]] {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|for [[template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]].}}'''
This page is not necessarily intended to be viewed directly. If it uses [[w:Help:Variable|variable]]s, some links may appear broken. Do not replace these variables with [[w:hardcoded|hardcoded]] page names or URLs. |}
[[Category:Template documentation|{{PAGENAME}}]] ----
''[[Template:Template doc page viewed directly]] template ends''
;Note: This template will take an alternative parameter {{{1}}} when it is applied as a X/doc style warning in a common usage page for several utility templates. (Such as are normally related by function or application and frequently list one another as ''see also'' pages.)

It contains usage information, [[Wikipedia:Categories|categories]] and other content that is not part of the original {{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} page|article}}.
}}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{PAGENAME}}}}{{ #if: {{{inhibit|}}} | | [[Category:{{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | Article }} documentation| ]] }} | }} {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} ---- {{documentation}}

revision.comment: make backward compatible with a work around
Changed to "{{pp-template|small=yes}}" since this template is fully protected.
Update to use the {{mbox}} so it looks good on top of other mboxes on documentation pages. And using mbox and not ombox since this template is used on several types of pages.
Adding [[File:Edit-copy green.svg]], since I think this message box needs an image so it is easy to recognise.
update link, per EP on talk
[[WP:RBK|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Rich Farmbrough|Rich Farmbrough]] ([[User talk:Rich Farmbrough|talk]]) to last version by Rjd0060
Adding ":" in front of the basepage name, so it doesn't show the image if a file page, and doesn't categorize if a category.
also mention that interlanguage links are typcally found on /doc pages
add tracking category for deprecated style
tracking category is still empty after three days, so going ahead and removing the "original-recipe" code
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}} | {{{override|doc}}} | {{ #ifeq: {{{doc-notice|show}}} | show | {{mbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Edit-copy green.svg|40px]] | text = '''This is a [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|documentation]] [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] for {{{1|[[:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]]}}}''' (see that page for the {{ #if: {{{text1|}}} | {{{text1}}} | {{ #ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{ns:User}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} template | {{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} | article }}}}}} itself).

revision.comment: make backward compatible with a work around
Changed to "{{pp-template|small=yes}}" since this template is fully protected.
Update to use the {{mbox}} so it looks good on top of other mboxes on documentation pages. And using mbox and not ombox since this template is used on several types of pages.
Adding [[File:Edit-copy green.svg]], since I think this message box needs an image so it is easy to recognise.
update link, per EP on talk
Adding ":" in front of the basepage name, so it doesn't show the image if a file page, and doesn't categorize if a category.
also mention that interlanguage links are typcally found on /doc pages
add tracking category for deprecated style
tracking category is still empty after three days, so going ahead and removing the "original-recipe" code
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}} | {{{override|doc}}} | {{ #ifeq: {{{doc-notice|show}}} | show | {{mbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Edit-copy green.svg|40px]] | text = '''This is a [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|documentation]] [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] for {{{1|[[:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]]}}}''' (see that page for the {{ #if: {{{text1|}}} | {{{text1}}} | {{ #ifeq: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{ns:User}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} template | {{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} | article }}}}}} itself).

revision.comment: Use [[Template:Terminate sentence]], which correctly determines when to add a full stop.
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}} |{{{override|doc}}} | {{#ifeq:{{{doc-notice|show}}} |show | {{Mbox | type = notice | style = margin-bottom:1.0em; | image = [[File:Edit-copy green.svg|40px|alt=|link=]] | text = '''This is a [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|documentation]] [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] for {{terminate sentence|{{{1|[[:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]]}}}}}'''
It contains usage information, [[Wikipedia:Categorization|categories]] and other content that is not part of the original {{#if:{{{text2|}}} |{{{text2}}} |{{#if:{{{text1|}}} |{{{text1}}} |{{#ifeq:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{ns:User}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} template page |{{#if:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |{{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} page|article}}}}}}}}. }} }}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{{defaultsort|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{inhibit|}}} | | {{#ifexist:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}} | [[Category:{{#switch:{{SUBJECTSPACE}} |Template=Template |Module=Module |User=User |#default=Wikipedia}} documentation pages]] | [[Category:Documentation subpages without corresponding pages]] }} }} | }}{{Documentation}}

When it is viewed directly, links using [[Help:Variable|variables]] may appear broken; do not replace these with [[hard coding|hardcoded]] page names or URLs.
{{#if: {{{inhib|{{{inhibit|}}}}}} ||[[Category:Template documentation|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: simplified, provide more information, link to subjectspace (for weird cases)
revision.text: {| style="width:100%; border:1px solid #CCC;" |- style="vertical-align:top;" | style="width:30px;" | [[Image:Edit-paste.svg|30px]] | This is a [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|documentation subpage]], where instructions, categories, or other information is stored for [[Project:Transclusion costs and benefits|technical reasons]]. To view the {{SUBJECTSPACE}} page itself, see {{{1|[[{{SUBJECTSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]]}}}. |} <includeonly>{{#if: {{{inhib|{{{inhibit|}}}}}} |<!-- skip -->|[[Category:Documentation subpages|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: merged in [[Template:Template doc page transcluded]] (switch based on whether current subpage name is "doc")
rm edit/history links (edit/view already provided by {{[[template:documentation|documentation]]}})
add id for people who do not need the message
+ defaultsort to page name, moved content to subpage

'''This is a [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|documentation]] [[Wikipedia:Subpages|subpage]] for {{{1|[[{{SUBJECTSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]]}}}''' (see that page for the {{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{lc:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}} | article }} itself).

}}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{PAGENAME}}}}{{ #if: {{{inhibit|}}} | | [[Category:{{ #if: {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | {{SUBJECTSPACE}} | Article }} documentation| ]] }} | }} {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} ---- {{documentation}}

revision.comment: make backward compatible with a work around
Changed to "{{pp-template|small=yes}}" since this template is fully protected.
Update to use the {{mbox}} so it looks good on top of other mboxes on documentation pages. And using mbox and not ombox since this template is used on several types of pages.
Adding [[File:Edit-copy green.svg]], since I think this message box needs an image so it is easy to recognise.
update link, per EP on talk
[[WP:RBK|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Rich Farmbrough|Rich Farmbrough]] ([[User talk:Rich Farmbrough|talk]]) to last version by Rjd0060
Adding ":" in front of the basepage name, so it doesn't show the image if a file page, and doesn't categorize if a category.
also mention that interlanguage links are typcally found on /doc pages
add tracking category for deprecated style
tracking category is still empty after three days, so going ahead and removing the "original-recipe" code

revision.comment: update fm Meta -- This version now takes {1} if common usage, and let's you craft the message displayed vice the fixed link
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox standard-talk" style="border: 1px solid #c0c090; background-color: #f8eaba; width: 80%; margin: 2px 4px 2px 4px; " |- style="vertical-align:top;" | style="padding:1ex;width:60px;" align="center" | [[Image:Edit-paste.svg|none|40px]] | '''This is the [[w:Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern|template documentation page]] {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|for [[template:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]].}}'''
This page is not necessarily intended to be viewed directly. If it uses [[w:Help:Variable|variable]]s, some links may appear broken. Do not replace these variables with [[w:hardcoded|hardcoded]] page names or URLs. |}
[[Category:Template documentation|{{PAGENAME}}]] ----
''[[Template:Template doc page viewed directly]] template ends''
;Note: This template will take an alternative parameter {{{1}}} when it is applied as a X/doc style warning in a common usage page for several utility templates. (Such as are normally related by function or application and frequently list one another as ''see also'' pages.)

Ver: fix up interwiki issues, class mesagebox 'standard-talk' not so standard, make links interwiki.// [[User:Fabartus|Fra]][[User talk:Fabartus|nkB]] 21:47, 23 February 2007 (UTC) Org: Commons, IWTG perams adusts, (mn) [[User:Fabartus|Fra]][[User talk:Fabartus|nkB]] 18:44, 12 February 2007 (UTC) {{-}} ---- {{interwikitmp-grp|inhib=yes|SYS=yes|V=0}} == See also == * [[M:Meta:Template doc page pattern]] or [[W:Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern]] for how this template is used. * Related templates: # {{tlw| Template doc page transcluded}} (as redirect: ''{{tlw|Template doc page pattern}}'') # {{tlw| Interwiki doc page pattern}} [[Category:Template documentation |!{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Template namespace templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] {{-}} [[ja:Template:テンプレート文書直接表示]]   [[sl:Predloga:Neposredno prikazana dokumentacijska stran predloge]]   [[uk:Шаблон:Документація шаблона (безпосередня)]]

revision.comment: simplify formatting, and this - of all templates - might as well have documentation in a subpage if only to illustrate how the template is meant to work
revision.text: {| class="messagebox standard-talk" | style="vertical-align: top; padding: 1em" | [[Image:Edit-paste.svg|40px]] | This is the [[Wikipedia:Template doc page pattern|template documentation page]] {{{1|for [[{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}]].}}} ---- This page is not necessarily intended to be viewed directly. If it uses [[Help:Variable|variable]]s, some links may appear broken. Do not replace these variables with [[hardcoded]] page names or URLs. |} ---- <includeonly>[[Category:Template documentation|{{PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly><noinclude> {{{{FULLPAGENAME}}/doc}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>
